purpose: Static mapping from finding types and severities to System Requirements (SRs) and Foundational Requirements (FRs). Consumed by the Impact Map tier deliverable to render an SR-coverage matrix and to cite specific SR violations per finding. This is a curated subset of the 51 SRs in IEC 62443-3-3 — chosen for coverage across all 7 FRs and mappability to the finding types this scanner toolchain produces.
scope_note: Mapping is illustrative for assessment reporting, not a substitute for a formal IEC 62443 conformance audit. SR descriptions are paraphrased; consult the standard for normative text.

foundational_requirements.name: Identification and Authentication Control
foundational_requirements.summary: Identify and authenticate all users, processes, and devices before granting access to control system assets.

foundational_requirements.name: Use Control
foundational_requirements.summary: Enforce authorized actions and audit usage by authenticated identities.

foundational_requirements.name: System Integrity
foundational_requirements.summary: Ensure integrity of the control system, its software, and the data it produces.

foundational_requirements.name: Data Confidentiality
foundational_requirements.summary: Protect information at rest and in transit from unauthorized disclosure.

foundational_requirements.name: Restricted Data Flow
foundational_requirements.summary: Segment the system into zones and conduits to limit unnecessary data flow.

foundational_requirements.name: Timely Response to Events
foundational_requirements.summary: Detect, log, and respond to security events in a timeframe consistent with risk.

foundational_requirements.name: Resource Availability
foundational_requirements.summary: Maintain control function availability under degraded and adversarial conditions.

system_requirements.name: Human user identification and authentication
system_requirements.description: Identify and authenticate all human users before granting any control-system access.

system_requirements.name: Software process and device identification and authentication
system_requirements.description: Identify and authenticate software processes and devices establishing connections to the control system.

system_requirements.name: Authenticator management
system_requirements.description: Manage authenticators (passwords, keys, certs) including initial distribution, revocation, rotation, and protection from disclosure.

system_requirements.name: Strength of password-based authentication
system_requirements.description: Enforce password strength, history, and lifetime policies on all password-based authenticators.

system_requirements.name: Strength of public key authentication
system_requirements.description: Validate public key authenticators against an acceptable certificate authority and enforce key strength minima.

system_requirements.name: Authorization enforcement
system_requirements.description: Enforce assigned privileges so authenticated identities can only perform authorized actions on the control system.

system_requirements.name: Mobile code
system_requirements.description: Restrict and audit the use of mobile code (e.g. ActiveX, signed scripts) to authorized sources and behaviors.

system_requirements.name: Auditable events
system_requirements.description: Generate audit records for security-relevant events sufficient to support after-the-fact investigation.

system_requirements.name: Communication integrity
system_requirements.description: Protect integrity of transmitted information against unauthorized modification on the wire.

system_requirements.name: Software and information integrity
system_requirements.description: Detect, record, and respond to unauthorized changes to software, configuration, and project artifacts.

system_requirements.name: Input validation
system_requirements.description: Validate the syntax and semantics of input received from untrusted sources.

system_requirements.name: Session integrity
system_requirements.description: Protect session state against modification, replay, and hijacking.

system_requirements.name: Information confidentiality
system_requirements.description: Protect information at rest and in transit from unauthorized disclosure, including secrets in configuration files and backups.

system_requirements.name: Use of cryptography
system_requirements.description: Apply cryptographic mechanisms appropriate to the protected asset class, with key strength and algorithm choices reviewed against current guidance.

system_requirements.name: Network segmentation
system_requirements.description: Logically partition the control system into zones and conduits per the reference architecture.

system_requirements.name: Zone boundary protection
system_requirements.description: Monitor and enforce communication policies at zone boundaries; deny by default.

system_requirements.name: Application partitioning
system_requirements.description: Separate application-layer functions (operator HMI, engineering, safety) into distinct zones with controlled conduits.

system_requirements.name: Audit log accessibility
system_requirements.description: Make audit logs accessible to authorized personnel for review and analysis.

system_requirements.name: Continuous monitoring
system_requirements.description: Continuously monitor the control system for indicators of compromise and policy violations.

system_requirements.name: Denial of service protection
system_requirements.description: Protect against and recover from denial-of-service conditions that affect control function availability.

system_requirements.name: Network and security configuration settings
system_requirements.description: Manage network and security configuration settings against an approved baseline, with change control and drift detection.

expected_consumers: Impact Map tier deliverable renderer (planned netlify function or analyst page section, not yet implemented)
Per-finding SR-violation citation in T2/T3 reports
Asset-type → expected-SRs coverage matrix in analyst dashboard
